query:
SELECT a.externalId, c.nome as competencia, ac.peso, ac.microInicio, ac.microTermino
FROM assessment_competencias ac
JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id
JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id
JOIN competencias c ON ac.competenciaId = c.id
WHERE a.externalId IN ('651877', '651878', '651879', '651880')
AND ap.trilhaId = 60001
AND c.id IN (60015, 60023, 60032);
command:

SELECT a.externalId, c.nome as competencia, ac.peso, ac.microInicio, ac.microTermino
FROM assessment_competencias ac
JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id
JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id
JOIN competencias c ON ac.competenciaId = c.id
WHERE a.externalId IN ('651877', '651878', '651879', '651880')
AND ap.trilhaId = 60001
AND c.id IN (60015, 60023, 60032);
